title: erodium crispum
intro: Erodium crispum, also known as the Corn Marigold or Corn Buttercup, is a perennial plant belonging to the Geranium family, known for its bright yellow and pink flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Erodium crispum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Erodium crispum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties.
